Server Protocol Version: 35
Is Local: yes
Client Index: 52
Tile Size: 65496
User Name: erce
Host Name: fedora
Server Name: PulseAudio (on PipeWire 0.3.71)
Server Version: 15.0.0

Default Source: alsa_input.pci-0000_00_1f.3.analog-stereo
